title: Croatian Hazelnut Skewers
description: A tangy and snappy Croatian dish featuring shelled hazelnuts, these skewers are perfect for a quick snack or appetizer. They are also FODMAP-friendly and salt-baked to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the salt and water until the salt is dissolved.
Add the hazelnuts to the bowl and toss to coat with the salt mixture.
Thread the hazelnuts onto skewers, leaving a small space between each nut.
Drizzle the olive oil over the hazelnuts and sprinkle with black pepper, paprika, and garlic-free seasoning.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the skewers warm and enjoy.
